footer.tagline: Plan your trips with AI help. Personalized itineraries, restaurants and interactive maps.

seo.homeDesc: Plan your trips with AI. Personalized itineraries, restaurants and interactive maps.
seo.destinationsDesc: Discover where to go: curated destinations and travel inspiration.
seo.assistantDesc: Itinerary and restaurant suggestions based on your search.
seo.carteDesc: View your destinations on a world map.
seo.discoveryDesc: Detailed travel itinerary, restaurant or idea.
seo.destinationDetailDesc: Stay ideas and a suggested itinerary for your destination.
seo.destinationPageDesc: Suggested itinerary for {{name}} ({{country}}). From {{price}}. Voyageur demo — no real booking.
seo.destinationSlugNotFoundDesc: This page does not exist or is no longer available. Browse destinations from the home page.
seo.profileDesc: Manage your name, email and password.

home.heroSubtitle: AI plans your itineraries, finds great restaurants, and guides you on interactive maps.
home.searchPlaceholder: Where do you want to go?
home.heroImageAlt: Aerial view of a tropical coastline at sunset
home.featuresSubtitle: From inspiration to itinerary — a smooth, personalized experience.
home.featDestDesc: Trends and ideas to pick your next stop.
home.featAssistantDesc: Describe what you want — tailored suggestions in seconds.
home.featMapDesc: See places and ideas on a world map.

assistant.pageDesc: Describe your ideal trip — we suggest itineraries, restaurants and activities from your data.
assistant.exampleHint: Example: “I want to visit Portugal with family for 5 days, with beaches and great food.”
assistant.apiErrorDesc: Results use local filtering on demo data.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: This URL does not match any Voyageur page.

suggestionDetail.notFound: That suggestion could not be found.

map.title: Your destinations at a glance
map.errorDesc: Markers shown are local fallback data.

admin.title: Administration
admin.subtitle: Statistics, search history and client notifications.
admin.sendNotifDesc: All client accounts or a specific user (ID).
admin.placeholderBody: Content shown in the notification bell…
admin.searchesDesc: Queries saved from the main search bar (signed in or guest).

trustStrip.cancelDesc: Policies vary by offer — confirm before you pay.
trustStrip.reviewsDesc: Aggregated scores and traveler feedback to guide you.
trustStrip.disclaimer: * OTA-style experience: data and labels are illustrative in this demo app.

destinationsPage.pageDesc: Search a region or country, refine by budget and theme, then compare stays and reviews to plan your trip.

destinationsSearch.hint: Dates and guest count are for the UI only (no real booking).

destinationsGrid.title: Where to go this season?
destinationsGrid.resultsTitle: Refine by budget, sort order, and theme
destinationsGrid.emptyFilter: No stays match these filters. Try broadening your search or budget.
destinationsGrid.viewersRecent: {{count}} travelers viewed this listing in the last 24 h (indicative)
destinationsGrid.priceFootnote: Indicative price for 2 guests · 1 week stay (demo).
destinationsGrid.mapSectionHint: Hover a pin for the indicative price. Click to open the page.

destinationDetail.reviewsDemo: Reviews are illustrative for this demo.
destinationDetail.bookDialogBody: Voyageur is a demo application: no real bookings, payments, or transactions are possible here.
destinationDetail.bookSummaryDatesPlaceholder: To choose with your travel agent or on a booking site
destinationDetail.bookStep1: Pick dates and number of travelers.
destinationDetail.bookStep2: Compare offers and conditions (cancellation, baggage, etc.).
destinationDetail.bookStep3: Pay on a website or with an advisor — never in this app.
destinationDetail.bookDialogNote: Here, no payment or commitment: use the assistant and map to plan your trip.
destinationDetail.demoDisclaimer: Prices, availability, traffic, and reviews are fictional or simplified — this is not a booking engine.

favorites.title: My favorites
favorites.subtitle: Saved destinations and ideas.
favorites.empty: No favorites yet. Use the heart on destination cards or AI suggestions.
favorites.loadErrorDesc: Make sure you are logged in and the API is running.

profile.title: My profile
profile.subtitle: Account details and security.
profile.name: Name
profile.passwordTooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters
profile.activityEmpty: Add hearts on destinations or AI suggestions to see them here.
profile.activityError: Could not load activity right now.
